{{- $videoId := .Get 0 -}} {{- if $videoId -}} {{- /* Extract video ID from full URL if provided */ -}} {{- if strings.Contains $videoId "share.descript.com/view/" -}} {{- $parts := split $videoId "share.descript.com/view/" -}} {{- if gt (len $parts) 1 -}} {{- $videoId = index $parts 1 | strings.TrimSuffix "/" -}} {{- end -}} {{- else if strings.Contains $videoId "share.descript.com/embed/" -}} {{- $parts := split $videoId "share.descript.com/embed/" -}} {{- if gt (len $parts) 1 -}} {{- $videoId = index $parts 1 | strings.TrimSuffix "/" -}} {{- end -}} {{- end -}}
{{- else -}}

Error: Descript video ID or URL is required. Usage: {{ "{{< descript VIDEO_ID >}}" }} or {{ "{{< descript https://share.descript.com/view/VIDEO_ID >}}" }}

{{- end -}}
